speaker:
FIRST
               
              SOLDIER
text: Brother, goodnight. Tomorrow is the day.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              SOLDIER
text: It will determine one way. Fare you well.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              SOLDIER
text: Heard you of nothing strange about the streets?

speaker:
SECOND
               
              SOLDIER
text: Belike ’tis but a rumor. Goodnight to you.

speaker:
SECOND
               
              SOLDIER
text: Our navy thrive, I have an absolute hope

speaker:
FIRST
               
              SOLDIER
text: ’Tis a brave army, and full of purpose.

speaker:
FOURTH
               
              SOLDIER
text: It signs well, does it not?

speaker:
FIRST
               
              SOLDIER
text: Peace, I say. What should this mean?

speaker:
SECOND
               
              SOLDIER
text: ’Tis the god Hercules, whom Antony loved,

speaker:
FIRST
               
              SOLDIER
text: Walk. Let’s see if other watchmen

speaker: ALL
text: How now? How now? Do you hear this?

speaker:
THIRD
               
              SOLDIER
text: Do you hear, masters? Do you hear?

speaker:
FIRST
               
              SOLDIER
text: Follow the noise so far as we have quarter.

speaker:
FIRST
               
              SOLDIER
text: Let’s see how it will give off.
